# Jérémy Wiki

> Wiki SRE/infra — 240+ articles pratiques sur Kubernetes, HAProxy, Terraform, Linux, monitoring et cloud par Jérémy Delgado, Senior Platform Engineer.

## Sections

- [Linux](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/linux/): CLI, sécurité, shell, systemd, stockage, networking — administration système Debian/Ubuntu
- [Kubernetes](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/kubernetes/): kubectl, ArgoCD, déploiements, troubleshooting, operators, RKE, Rancher
- [Cloud](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/cloud/): GCP (GKE, Workload Identity, Spot Nodes), AWS (CLI, IAM), Azure
- [Databases](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/databases/): MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, MongoDB, Memcached
- [Monitoring](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/monitoring/): Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Alloy, custom metrics, alerting
- [Automation](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/automation/): Terraform (cheatsheet, tools, speedup), Ansible, Makefile
- [Web](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/web/): HAProxy, nginx, Varnish, DNS, TLS/SSL, WordPress
- [Containers](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/containers/): Docker, Kafka
- [CI/CD](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/ci-cd/): GitLab CI optimization, image scanning
- [Networking](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/networking/): Cisco, MikroTik, pfSense
- [Hypervisor](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/hypervisor/): ESXi, Proxmox
- [Self-hosted](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/selfhost/): Nextcloud, Koel, Guacamole, ruTorrent
- [About the author](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/about/): Jérémy Delgado, Senior Platform Engineer at Equativ

## Sitemap

- [Full sitemap](https://wiki.jdelgado.fr/sitemap.xml): 240 pages, XML format
